Z1.text: Z1 WIDGETS: Widgets are the basic manoeuvre element. A widget may perform one action per turn [EXC: see Z1.12].

Z1.1.text: Z1.1 ACTIVATION: A widget activates by expending one token. Activation is voluntary.

Z1.11.text: Z1.11 DOUBLE ACTIVATION: A widget may not activate twice in the same turn unless it is Elite (Z2.1).

Z1.12.text: Z1.12 EXCEPTIONS: A stunned widget may perform no actions. This overrides Z1.

Z1.2.text: Z1.2 TOKENS: Each side receives three tokens per turn.

Z2.text: Z2 ELITE WIDGETS: Elite widgets follow all Z1 rules unless stated otherwise.

Z2.1.text: Z2.1 ELITE ACTIVATION: An Elite widget may activate twice per turn, paying one token each time.
